Maintainer.Profile: Peptide Pitstop — free, open-source, self-hosted tools for tracking peptide & GLP-1 therapy. Reconstitution math, dose logging, titration schedules, bloodwork trends and plasma-level modelling, in a private single-user dashboard. Privacy-first: your data stays on your own server, encrypted, with no telemetry. Built and maintained in the open on GitHub.
Maintainer.DonateText: If Peptide Pitstop is useful, you can support its development.
